title: actions.js — updateUserCards dispatch payload extended with normalisedCards
commit_message: feat: attach normalisedCards snapshot to updateUserCards for analytics

why_action_only.explanation: Only actions.js changes. Tests that list src/reducer/actions.js in sources[] are concentrated in payment-state.cross.test.js (updateUserCards + updatePaymentPlanDetails). Sibling describes in the same cross-dependent file are pulled in as HIGH. No standalone or auth suite lists actions.js — those suites SKIP.
why_action_only.key_point: Narrow blast radius: one cross-dependent file, 12 tests total in that file; 3 CRITICAL + 9 HIGH = 12 selected.

CRITICAL.reason: symbols[] contains 'updateUserCards' — direct match to changed function

tests.test: updateUserCards action dispatched into paymentReducer > populates userCards in state after dispatch
tests.why: describe + symbols reference updateUserCards; sources include actions.js

tests.test: updateUserCards action dispatched into paymentReducer > sets cardsFetched to true when cards are provided
updateUserCards action dispatched into paymentReducer > clears userCards when dispatched with an empty array

HIGH.reason: Same cross-dependent file (payment-state.cross.test.js) — sibling describe blocks; reducer still ignores unknown action fields so tests likely pass

tests.test: updatePaymentPlanDetails action and paymentReducer > stores the subscription plan object in paymentPlantDetails
updatePaymentPlanDetails action and paymentReducer > does not mutate userCards when a plan update is dispatched
paymentActions.CLEARCARDS resets payment state > resets userCards to an empty array
tests.why: Conservative same-file inclusion after a CRITICAL hit in this suite

tests.test: paymentActions.CLEARCARDS resets payment state > resets cardsFetched back to false after clearing
storageKeys align with payment flow expectations > storageKeys.stripePaymentDetails equals STRIPEPAYMENTDETAILS
storageKeys align with payment flow expectations > storageKeys.token equals TOKEN
CARD_NUMBER_REGEX validates checkout flow input > accepts a standard 19-character card number with spaces
CARD_NUMBER_REGEX validates checkout flow input > rejects a card number shorter than 17 characters
CARD_NUMBER_REGEX validates checkout flow input > rejects a card number that contains letters

SKIP.reason: actions.js not in sources[] for standalone, auth-storage, or feature suites

coverage_gaps.detail: normalisedCards is not asserted in any test; consider a unit test that expects the action object shape.

jest_run_command: npx jest --config test_repository/jest.config.js --no-coverage -t "updateUserCards|updatePaymentPlanDetails|paymentActions\.CLEARCARDS|storageKeys align with payment flow|CARD_NUMBER_REGEX validates checkout" --verbose
